settings.heading: Choose the clearest next step
settings.copy: Start with one of four paths: download, manual, compatibility, or direct help.
settings.support_note: Each path keeps the product and setup in view so you can move forward without guessing.

settings.heading: Start with one clear path
settings.copy: Most support questions begin with a file, a guide, a fit check, or a support request.

settings.title: Find a download
settings.copy: Start here when the next step is a driver, utility, or firmware file for the product you already own.

settings.title: Find a manual
settings.copy: Start here when you need setup steps, a quick-start path, or product instructions.

settings.title: Check compatibility
settings.copy: Start here when you need to confirm platform, device, or workflow fit before you buy or install.

settings.title: Get help now
settings.copy: Start a single support request when the answer depends on your exact product, order, or warranty status.

settings.heading: Still unsure which path fits?
settings.copy: Start one support request and we will route product help, order help, or warranty help from the same place.
